hero.label: indie developer
hero.heading3: I build all kinds of things.
hero.description: I'm an indie app developer. I bring ideas to life across iOS, Android, and the web.

about.name: @River
about.bio1: I'm an indie developer. I build whatever comes to mind, from games to handy tools.
about.bio2: I mainly develop mobile apps (iOS / Android), but also build web apps and PC tools. It makes me happy when people use what I create.
about.bio3: Feel free to reach out for work inquiries, collaborations, or any other questions.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.contactBody: If you have any questions about this policy, please reach out via our

sections.title: Introduction
sections.body: riverapp.jp (hereinafter referred to as "this site") is a portfolio site for independently developed apps. This page describes how personal information is handled on this site. Each app listed on this site may have its own individual privacy policy. Please refer to the detail page of each app for its specific privacy policy.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: This site may automatically collect the following information for the purpose of improving our services.
bullets: Access logs (IP address, browser information, referrer URL, pages viewed, etc.)
Site usage data collected by Vercel Analytics (anonymized)

sections.title: Use of Cookies
sections.body: This site may use cookies for analytics purposes. You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but please note that some features may not function properly.

sections.title: Purpose of Use
sections.body: The information collected is used for the following purposes.

sections.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
sections.body: We do not disclose collected information to third parties, except as required by law.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: This policy may be updated without prior notice. Any changes will take effect as soon as they are posted on this page.

appDocument.contactIntro: If you have any questions, bug reports, or feature requests regarding this app, please feel free to reach out using any of the methods below.
appDocument.privacyContactBody: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please visit our
